name: Feedback bar
goal: Bind a row of feedback controls to a single item id within a subject and emit one aggregated state event per change.
description: Per-item row container that walks its descendants on connect and on every slotchange to set data-ce-subject + data-ce-item on every ce-rating, ce-bookmark, ce-dismiss, and ce-comment that doesn't already declare them. Listens to bubbling change events from those descendants and re-emits a single aggregated ce-feedback-item-state event after every change. Does not stop propagation — the original events still bubble to an ancestor ce-feedback-sink.

props.name: item
props.description: Stable item id within the subject. Required at runtime; a missing value triggers a console warning.

props.name: subject
props.description: Subject id; falls back to ancestor ce-feedback-sink.

props.name: label
props.description: Human-readable item label; surfaces in export output and as aria-label.

props.name: layout
props.description: Visual layout — inline (default), stacked (column), or compact (tighter gap).

events.name: ce-feedback-item-state
events.description: Fires after any descendant feedback control changes; carries the aggregated per-item state.

slots.description: Feedback controls (ce-rating, ce-bookmark, ce-dismiss, ce-comment, etc.).

sideEffects.description: Sets data-ce-subject and data-ce-item on feedback descendants that lack them.
sideEffects.reason: Single-source-of-truth wiring for sink event normalization.

a11y.notes: aria-label comes from the label attribute (or slotted label content). Descendants keep their own ARIA roles.
